settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your app preferences, CLI tools, and agent hooks
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.description: Choose the interface appearance and display language
settings.general.themeDescription: Use the macOS setting or force a light or dark interface
settings.startup.title: App Startup
settings.startup.openAtLoginDescription: Keep VibeTime available in the menu bar after sign in
settings.cli.title: Command Line
settings.cli.description: Expose the stable VibeTime command in your shell
settings.cli.addPathSuffix: to PATH to run vibetime from any shell
settings.cli.conflictSuffix: already exists and is not managed by VibeTime
settings.agents.title: Agent Hooks
settings.agents.description: Manage VibeTime hooks for your AI agents without touching other configurations
settings.aliases.title: Project Aliases
settings.aliases.description: Map raw project directory names to display names, changes are saved to config.toml
settings.about.title: About VibeTime
settings.about.description: Build info and local data storage
today.title: Today
live.title: Live
live.unable: Unable to load data. Try reopening VibeTime.
live.noActiveTurnDescription: Start a coding-agent turn and it will appear here
history.title: History
history.noHistoryDescription: Captured turns will appear here after your first completed session.
history.noAgentActivity: No agent activity in this period.
history.contributionHeatmapDescription: Daily activity over the last 365 days
history.projectShareDescription: Where time went in the selected period
history.focusDurationDescription: Macro composition of task session lengths
history.projectEngagementDescription: Rhythm and flow patterns of key projects
usage.title: Usage
usage.refreshFrequencyDescription: Scan Claude Code and Codex usage in the background after VibeTime launches
usage.emptyDescription: VibeTime will show Claude Code and Codex tokens after the next background scan
usage.errorTitle: Usage data could not be loaded
usage.errorDescription: Try refreshing Usage or reopen VibeTime
usage.disclaimer: Estimated from local token records and cached public pricing
usage.pricingUnavailable: Pricing unavailable, token totals are still shown
usage.claudeCodexOnly: Usage totals include Claude Code and Codex only
usage.dailyUsageTrendDescription: Daily estimated cost or token volume for the selected period
usage.tokenBreakdownDescription: Input, cache, output, and reasoning token composition
usage.tableDescription: Hook-linked project ranking plus transcript-only model and agent rows
usage.auditDescription: Unknown prices and unassigned usage stay visible instead of being hidden
usage.noAuditIssues: No pricing or attribution issues in this period
